mapper.sql: Id, GZId, InvoiceNo, SupplierCode, OrderNo, ShipDate, ModelNo, Quantity, CaseNo, Barcode, Price, Status, OriginCode, OriginCountry, Unit, NoRef, ProductCode, TransType, Remark, ImpTime, Weight, ModelENName, OrderType, TariffRate, CNName, UpdTime, JPHSCode, CNHSCode
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo._SupplierInvoice
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._SupplierInvoice (Id, GZId, InvoiceNo, SupplierCode, OrderNo, ShipDate, ModelNo, Quantity, CaseNo, Barcode, Price, Status, OriginCode, OriginCountry, Unit, NoRef, ProductCode, TransType, Remark, ImpTime, Weight, ModelENName, OrderType, TariffRate, CNName, UpdTime, JPHSCode, CNHSCode) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{gzid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{suppliercode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{barcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{origincode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{origincountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{noref,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imptime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{modelenname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{ordertype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{tariffrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cnname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{updtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{jphscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cnhscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

mapper.update:
update dbo._SupplierInvoice
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
GZId = #{record.gzid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
InvoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SupplierCode = #{record.suppliercode,jdbcType=CHAR},
OrderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ShipDate = #{record.shipdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CaseNo = #{record.caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Barcode = #{record.barcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
OriginCode = #{record.origincode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OriginCountry = #{record.origincountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Unit = #{record.unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
NoRef = #{record.noref,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ProductCode = #{record.productcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TransType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ImpTime = #{record.imptime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ModelENName = #{record.modelenname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
OrderType = #{record.ordertype,jdbcType=CHAR},
TariffRate = #{record.tariffrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
CNName = #{record.cnname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
UpdTime = #{record.updtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
JPHSCode = #{record.jphscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CNHSCode = #{record.cnhscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo._SupplierInvoice set Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, GZId = #{record.gzid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, InvoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SupplierCode = #{record.suppliercode,jdbcType=CHAR}, OrderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ShipDate = #{record.shipdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CaseNo = #{record.caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Barcode = #{record.barcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, OriginCode = #{record.origincode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OriginCountry = #{record.origincountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Unit = #{record.unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NoRef = #{record.noref,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ProductCode = #{record.productcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TransType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ImpTime = #{record.imptime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, Weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ModelENName = #{record.modelenname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, OrderType = #{record.ordertype,jdbcType=CHAR}, TariffRate = #{record.tariffrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, CNName = #{record.cnname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, UpdTime = #{record.updtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, JPHSCode = #{record.jphscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CNHSCode = #{record.cnhscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo._SupplierInvoice
GZId = #{gzid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
InvoiceNo = #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SupplierCode = #{suppliercode,jdbcType=CHAR},
OrderNo = #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ShipDate = #{shipdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CaseNo = #{caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Barcode = #{barcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
OriginCode = #{origincode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OriginCountry = #{origincountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Unit = #{unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
NoRef = #{noref,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ProductCode = #{productcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TransType = #{transtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ImpTime = #{imptime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ModelENName = #{modelenname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
OrderType = #{ordertype,jdbcType=CHAR},
TariffRate = #{tariffrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
CNName = #{cnname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
UpdTime = #{updtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
JPHSCode = #{jphscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CNHSCode = #{cnhscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo._SupplierInvoice set GZId = #{gzid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, InvoiceNo = #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SupplierCode = #{suppliercode,jdbcType=CHAR}, OrderNo = #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ShipDate = #{shipdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CaseNo = #{caseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Barcode = #{barcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, OriginCode = #{origincode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OriginCountry = #{origincountry,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Unit = #{unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NoRef = #{noref,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ProductCode = #{productcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TransType = #{transtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ImpTime = #{imptime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, Weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ModelENName = #{modelenname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, OrderType = #{ordertype,jdbcType=CHAR}, TariffRate = #{tariffrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, CNName = #{cnname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, UpdTime = #{updtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, JPHSCode = #{jphscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CNHSCode = #{cnhscode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
